summary.authoritative_rule: when the next frontier is deferred and its opening checklist exists, the correct action is to retain prelaunch readiness without opening the frontier

triage_rows.rationale: the board now has a clean single-card summary for later explicit frontier opening
reduce remains complete enough and should not be reopened through deferred-frontier preparation
prelaunch readiness is not equivalent to permission to start the next frontier

interpretation: V1.34DC turns the prelaunch card into a final governance judgment: the next frontier is ready to be named, not ready to be silently opened.
This preserves a clean handoff boundary between reduce completion and the later explicit start of intraday add.
